title: public flat comment causing model constructor segfault
body:
im trying to co-sim with a c++ axi slave device , the c++ slave model requires to read verilated axi interfaces in c++ 
i have written an axi master , but since the axi master is not top module , i cant access the axi intefaces after verilating it
i read the document and append /**verilator public_flat_rd**/ after the interface wires , then i can access the interface signals. but after doing that , when initilize the verilated model ,  segmentfault is immediately triggered , i backtraced the error and here is what i found (pasted following), it seems that the constructor of the verilated model has caused the trouble.

if there is no public flat comment , the code works just fine.

#0  0x00007ffff7e7225e in std::_Rb_tree_decrement(std::_Rb_tree_node_base*) () from /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libstdc++.so.6
#1  0x000055555556d4e7 in std::_Rb_tree_iterator<std::pair<char const* const, VerilatedScope const*> >::operator-- (
    this=0x7fffffffda30)
    at /usr/include/c++/9/bits/stl_tree.h:302
#2  0x000055555556d429 in std::_Rb_tree<char const*, std::pair<char const* const, VerilatedScope const*>, std::_Select1st<std::pair<char const* const, VerilatedScope const*> >, VerilatedCStrCmp, std::allocator<std::pair<char const* const, VerilatedScope const*> > >::_M_get_insert_unique_pos (
    this=0x5555555bc3a0 <VerilatedImp::s_s+96>,
    __k=@0x5555555e36f0: 0x5555555e3710 "TOP.core")
    at /usr/include/c++/9/bits/stl_tree.h:2104
#3  0x000055555556a9b4 in std::_Rb_tree<char const*, std::pair<char const* const, VerilatedScope const*>, std::_Select1st<std::pair<char const* const, VerilatedScope const*> >, VerilatedCStrCmp, std::allocator<std::pair<char const* const, VerilatedScope const*> > >::_M_get_insert_hint_unique_pos (
    this=0x5555555bc3a0 <VerilatedImp::s_s+96>, __position=
  {first = 0x0, second = 0x0},
    __k=@0x5555555e36f0: 0x5555555e3710 "TOP.core")
    at /usr/include/c++/9/bits/stl_tree.h:2201
#4  0x0000555555568b8a in std::_Rb_tree<char const*, std::pair<char const* const, VerilatedScope const*>, std::_Select1st<std::pair<char const* const, VerilatedScope const*> >, VerilatedCStrCmp, std::allocator<std::pair<char const* const, VerilatedScope const*> > >::_M_emplace_hint_unique<std::pair<char const*, VerilatedScope const*> > (this=0x5555555bc3a0 <VerilatedImp::s_s+96>, __pos=
  {first = 0x0, second = 0x0})
    at /usr/include/c++/9/bits/stl_tree.h:2459
#5  0x00005555555672c1 in std::map<char const*, VerilatedScope const*, VerilatedCStrCmp, std::allocator<std::pair<char const* const, VerilatedScope const*> > >::insert<std::pair<char const*, VerilatedScope const*> > (this=0x5555555bc3a0 <VerilatedImp::s_s+96>,
    __position={first = 0x0, second = 0x0}, __x=...)
    at /usr/include/c++/9/bits/stl_map.h:876
#6  0x0000555555565ac5 in VerilatedImp::scopeInsert (
    scopep=0x5555555e3618)
    at /usr/share/verilator/include/verilated_imp.h:299
--Type <RET> for more, q to quit, c to continue without paging--c
#7  0x0000555555563e06 in VerilatedScope::configure (this=0x5555555e3618, symsp=0x5555555e3600, prefixp=0x5555555e35b0 "TOP", suffixp=0x5555555a57d3 "core", identifier=0x5555555a57d3 "core", type=VerilatedScope::SCOPE_OTHER) at /usr/share/verilator/include/verilated.cpp:2328
#8  0x0000555555592afc in Vcore__Syms::Vcore__Syms (this=0x5555555e3600, topp=0x5555555d9f00, namep=0x5555555e35b0 "TOP") at Vcore__Syms.cpp:23
